introText: Giannis & Elina Kiriakou Architecture Studio, founded in Patras in 1975. We undertake the design, supervision and construction of buildings — residences, apartment buildings, commercial spaces, hotels — with applications in bioclimatic architecture and solar design.
metaDescription: Kiriakou Architecture Studio in Patras, Greece. Design, supervision and construction of buildings since 1975. Residences, commercial spaces, bioclimatic architecture.
